response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable C++ experience on Windows or in capital markets/fixed income domains; their career is dominated by JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web/mobile projects with no evidence of financial systems, SQL Server/Oracle, or Windows-based C++ development required for the role.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering background across diverse tech stacks
Proven experience with CI/CD, testing practices, and open-source contributions
Excellent communication skills demonstrated through workshops and talks
concerns: No visible C++ experience on Windows platform as required
No domain expertise in fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking
SQL experience listed but not tied to SQL Server or Oracle in financial contexts
